candidates.why: This appears as a separate operating line item alongside the selected COGS row 'Cost of goods sold'. The statement structure shows 'Cost of goods sold' plus this depreciation row (and comparability items) reconciling to 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so the depreciation does not appear embedded in the selected COGS bucket and should be added separately.
This is not COGS-related; it appears in the operating expense section below SG&A, so it should not be mapped to COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected only the separate COGS-related D&A row. It sits outside the chosen 'Cost of goods sold' row and reconciles into total cost of revenues, so adding it separately avoids understating COGS D&A.

candidates.why: This appears as a separate operating expense line item at the same level as 'Sales, general and administration', and it rolls into 'Operating Expenses - Total' rather than appearing nested within the selected SG&A row. Therefore it should be added separately relative to the selected XSGA bucket.
This is explicitly tied to cost of revenues / COGS, not SG&A.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is only 'Sales, general and administration'. The separate amortization line is outside that selected row and is included in operating expenses total, so it should be added separately to XSGA-related D&A.
